emails.subject: New Confirm Template
emails.body: New Confirm Template Per our discussion this morning I have attached the new form for our confirms. Please let me know if further changes are necessary. Thank you for your help! Kimberly Hundl x31647

emails.subject: RE: New Confirm Template
emails.body: RE: New Confirm Template Kim: A very general question: shouldn't all of the financial power templates provide for corrections to published prices and rounding to four places for commodities quoted in MMBtus? Your template does not contain either of these.

emails.subject: RE: New Confirm Template
emails.body: Yes, all templates should include language covering corrections to published prices. On October 9th, I forwarded an email to you requesting your review of that language that we received from Brent Hendry. I had not heard back yet, but was planning to add that to our templates after I got your approval. If you would like that email re-sent, please let me know. The only rounding language that I am aware of, is in the second to last paragraph of this template. Please let me know what changes are necessary.

emails.subject: RE: New Confirm Template
emails.body: Kim: Do you want to take a stab at the revision for this deal? Sara

emails.subject: RE: New Confirm Template
emails.body: this is the completed confirm with your changes.
